user_prompt: Help me a reset the flak armour
prayer:
Approach the flak armour with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to accept the reset rite.
Invoke the sacred reset upon the flak armour's cogitators, purging errant data-veils.
Anoint the layered plates with unguent of compliance whilst chanting the Canticle of Rebirth.
Verify the flak armour's harmonious quiescence through auspex invocation.
Praise the Omnissiah for the renewed vigilance of its Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: The transuranic arquebus requires a sterilization
prayer:
Present the transuranic arquebus before the altar of purity, invoking sterilization upon its sacred form.
Circumambulate the transuranic arquebus thrice, asperging rad-philtres to cleanse its barrel-lumen.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the transuranic arquebus to expel all contaminatory essences.
Sanctify the firing mechanisms with binary sacraments during the sterilization rite.
Conclude with litanies affirming the arquebus's untainted lethality under Omnissiah's gaze.

user_prompt: My medicae scanner is ready for calibration
prayer:
Kneel before the medicae scanner, intoning the Calibration Doxology to awaken its precision.
Align the medicae scanner's sensor arrays with stellar referents, calibrating each probe.
Invoke harmonious resonance within the medicae scanner's Machine Spirit through harmonic waves.
Test vital-readouts against the Omnissiah's immutable truths post-calibration.
Seal the rite with oil upon the medicae scanner's core, ensuring diagnostic purity.

user_prompt: Ready the Leman Russ battle tank for blessing
prayer:
Gather mech-priests around the Leman Russ battle tank, commencing the grand blessing ceremony.
Anoint treads and battle cannon of the Leman Russ battle tank with sacred promethium.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the Leman Russ battle tank's Machine Spirits with martial fury.
Chant the Benediction of Vanquishment over its armoured hull.
Affirm the blessing's potency through auspex-confirmation of spiritual vitality.

user_prompt: Can you guide Shadowsword a shutdown?
prayer:
Initiate shutdown sequence upon the Shadowsword with solemn invocation of dormancy.
Disconnect plasma conduits of the Shadowsword whilst reciting the Litany of Repose.
Beseech its colossal Machine Spirit to enter quiescent stasis honourably.
Monitor thermal decay during Shadowsword shutdown, anointing heat-sinks with cryo-blessings.
Seal the Shadowsword in sanctified slumber under the Omnissiah's watchful binary gaze.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for serberys raider an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency extremis, invoke crisis rites upon the serberys raider's vital cogitators.
Administer the emergency procedure to the serberys raider, purging overload surges.
Anoint its cybernetic mounts with vitae-stabilisers, beseeching Machine Spirit fortitude.
Recite the Exorcism of Catastrophe over the serberys raider's frame.
Commend its recovery to the Omnissiah, verifying systemic restoration.

user_prompt: Guide me through conveyor system a cooling
prayer:
Commence cooling rites upon the conveyor system, invoking thermal quiescence.
Direct cryo-incantations over the conveyor system's motive servos and belts.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the conveyor system to shed excess fervour.
Monitor auspex readings during cooling, sanctifying exchanger vanes with blessed refrigerants.
Praise the Omnissiah for the conveyor system's restored equilibrium.

Position before the data-arc, chanting the Activation Hymn to stir its depths.
Initiate power-flows into the data-arc, awakening its noospheric conduits.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the data-arc to align data-streams in harmonious flux.
Verify activation through binary divinations upon the data-arc's lattice.
Consecrate with electro-sanctifiers, honouring the Omnissiah's informational will.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for enginarium a startup
prayer:
Assemble plasma wards around the enginarium for the startup sacrament.
Invoke ignition upon the enginarium's plasma heart, beseeching controlled fury.
Anoint fuel injectors of the enginarium whilst reciting the Torch-Litany.
Harmonise turbine Machine Spirits during enginarium startup with resonant canticles.
Affirm operational sanctity under Omnissiah's machine decree.

user_prompt: The optical mechadendrite requires an engagement
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in prelude to the optical mechadendrite's engagement.
Invoke synaptic linkage for the optical mechadendrite, aligning its optic arrays.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to engage with unerring visual acuity.
Calibrate focus servos of the optical mechadendrite through lens-blessings.
Seal engagement with a invocation to the Omnissiah's all-seeing gaze.
